deletionStatuses.detail: Submitting a request starts an auditable support-reviewed deletion workflow. It is not instant.
deletionStatuses.headline: No account deletion request is active.

deletionStatuses.detail: Your request was received and is waiting for support acknowledgement.
deletionStatuses.headline: Deletion request submitted.

deletionStatuses.detail: Support has acknowledged your request and will continue review.
deletionStatuses.headline: Deletion request acknowledged.

deletionStatuses.detail: Support is actively reviewing your account deletion request.
deletionStatuses.headline: Deletion request in review.

deletionStatuses.detail: Your deletion request has been completed.
deletionStatuses.headline: Account deletion completed.

deletionStatuses.detail: The deletion request was cancelled and no longer blocks a new request.
deletionStatuses.headline: Deletion request cancelled.

deletionStatuses.detail: The request was closed by support. Contact support for details.
deletionStatuses.headline: Deletion request closed.

privacySummaryExamples.directInvites: People outside your circles can send invite requests.
privacySummaryExamples.livePresence: Your live presence is visible to people in shared circles.
privacySummaryExamples.memberVisibility: Your profile appears in member lists for shared circles.

privacySummaryExamples.directInvites: Only people who already share a circle with you can invite you.
privacySummaryExamples.inviteRequests: New circle invite requests are paused.
privacySummaryExamples.livePresence: Your live presence is hidden from other participants.
privacySummaryExamples.memberVisibility: Your profile is hidden from member lists for other users.

privacySummaryExamples.livePresence: Your live presence is visible to all signed-in users.
